introduction: A reinforced chest is tucked into a dark corner of the sanctum, covered in dust. Unlike the cult's belongings, this chest appears to be from before their occupation.

The chest bears faded markings - a sword piercing a broken portal-stone, with protective runes around the border. This is the mark of the Blight Wardens - an order formed after the Arcane Collapse to guard the sealed Aethel portals.
A small inscription in ancient script reads: 'Should the Shadow return, may these arms serve the light once more. Eternal vigil against the Blight.'

The Blight Wardens are long gone - their order dissolved centuries ago when people forgot the threat was real. But their legacy remains. This chest was left for whoever would stand against the darkness when it inevitably returned.
